YOU

Which governed assets are visible in Discover?

ATLAS AI

Would you like to see only assets explicitly marked as visible in Discover if such a filter becomes available?

There are 18 governed assets currently visible in Discover, spanning domains such as Customer, Finance, Marketing, Operations, Product, and Risk. Examples include:

datapact.governance_atlas_demo.customer_identity_quality (Customer domain, Customer 360 product, Critical)
datapact.governance_atlas_demo.finance_lien_risk_summary (Finance domain, Lien Intelligence product, Certified)
datapact.governance_atlas_demo.marketing_market_analytics (Marketing domain, Market Analytics product, Certified)
datapact.governance_atlas_demo.operations_transfer_activity (Operations domain, Transfer Operations product, Certified)
datapact.governance_atlas_demo.risk_policy_exception_register (Risk domain, Risk Controls product, Certified)

Most assets are marked as Critical, and several are Certified or Trusted, indicating a strong focus on high-value, governed data.
